ItacPersonItem.Notes: He was a famous mathematician, studied in Rome with Cristoforo Clavio, in Antwerp with Michele Coignet, in Paris with Francesco Vieta. Lived the rest of his life between Venice and his native city, Ragusa. His affiliation among the Lincei was discussed in 1621 and in 1625.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
